title: moraea lineata
intro: Moraea lineata, also known as the Striped Gladiolus or Naked Glory Lily, is a plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family. Traditionally used in African and Asian folk medicine, the plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Moraea lineata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and infusions, to make herbal teas, tinctures, and topical creams for medicinal use.
